© 2026 Raximjon Tulaganov — Built with Next.js & TailwindCSS

Mathematics · English · Guitar · Calisthenics

Hozirda loyihalar uchun ochiq

Monorepo SaaS
Engineer.

TurboRepo monorepo asosida ko'p ilovali enterprise tizimlar quraman — 2 ta to'liq SaaS platforma, ERP dashboard, shared paketlar ekotizimi.

LOYIHALARNI KO'RISHMuloqot boshlash

Frontend Engineer — Monorepo & SaaS

Men — TurboRepo monorepo arxitekturasi asosida ko'p ilovali enterprise tizimlar quruvchi Frontend Engineerman. Procraft (4 app, 7 shared package, UZ/EN/RU i18n) va Urtak (3 app, 5 shared package, 4 rol ERP) — ikkala SaaS platformasini noldan arxitektura qilib, ishlab chiqdim. Docker + Nginx deployment va Cloudflare CDN integratsiyalari ham mening stegim.

Monorepo Architecture

TurboRepo + pnpm workspace: shared UI, hooks, services paketlari. Bir joyda o'zgartirish — barcha applarga avtomatik ta'sir.

Role-Based Systems

4 xil rol (superadmin, omborchi, operator, kuryer) — alohida routing, menyu, ruxsatlar. JWT + Axios interceptor bilan token auto-refresh.

Performance Engineering

TBT 13,370ms → ~0ms. 29 PNG → WebP (95% hajm). YouTube lazy facade. Lighthouse 90+ — har bir loyihada o'lchab, optimizatsiya qilingan.

Production Deployment

Docker Compose, Nginx reverse proxy, subdomain routing (username.procraft.uz). Cloudflare CDN va bot management sozlamalari.

⚡ Intellektual Tayyorgarlik

  • Muammoni tizimli o'ylab, eng sodda yechim topish.

  • Intizom: Calisthenics & GYM.

  • Ijodkorlik: Gitara va kreativlik.

    • Math & Logic CertifiedEnglish Proficiency

Stack & Tools

Portfolio

Tanlangan Loyihalar

Real mijozlar va startap loyihalar — har biri texnik murakkablik va muhandislik yechimlari bilan.

01
Open Source

Client — Multi-Page Corporate Website

HTML5 va CSS3 yordamida qurilgan ko'p sahifali korporativ veb-sayt. Semantic HTML markup, alohida sahifalar papkasi (pages/), shrift integratsiyasi. Pixel-perfect layout, responsive dizayn, toza va tartibli kod strukturasi.

HTML5CSS3Semantic HTMLResponsive
02
Open Source

CodeSandbox — Pixel-Perfect HTML/CSS Layout

Dizayn maketidan pixel-perfect HTML/CSS layout yaratish ko'nikmalarini namoyish etuvchi loyiha. Semantic HTML5 elementlari, toza CSS (Flexbox va Grid), shrift integratsiyasi (fonts/ papkasi). Responsive va chiziqli vizual hiyerarxiya. Har bir detalga e'tibor berib ishlanma — spacing, tipografiya, rang palitrasiga qat'iy rioya qilingan.

HTML5CSS3FlexboxGrid+1
03
Open Source

E-Commerce Website (Vanilla JS + SCSS)

Ko'p sahifali e-commerce veb-sayti — toza HTML5, SCSS va Vanilla JavaScript yordamida qurilgan. SCSS preprocessor bilan modulli uslub arxitekturasi, responsive layout (Flexbox va Grid), mahsulot kartochkalari, navigatsiya va sahifalar orasida o'tish. Backend frameworklarsiz yozilgan — barcha mantiq toza JS da.

HTML5SCSSVanilla JSResponsive+1
04
Open Source

GitHub User Search — REST API Integration

GitHub REST API bilan ishlashni namoyish etuvchi qidiruv ilovasi. Foydalanuvchi nomini kiritish orqali GitHub profili va omborxonalar haqida ma'lumot olish. Fetch API va async/await, debounce texnikasi, dinamik DOM manipulyatsiya. Toza CSS animatsiyalar va responsive karta dizayni. Real API integratsiyasining amaliy namunasi.

REST APIAsync/AwaitFetch APIDOM+1
05
Open Source

Happy Market

React va Vite yordamida qurilgan zamonaviy bozor ilovasi. Component-based arxitektura, React Hooks (useState, useEffect), pnpm paket menejeri. Mahsulotlarni ko'rish, saralash va savat funksionalligi. Fast Refresh bilan tezkor dasturlash muhiti ta'minlangan. ES Modules va Vite build optimizatsiyasi qo'llanilgan.

ReactViteReact Hookspnpm+1
06
Open Source

Personal Portfolio Website

Shaxsiy portfolio sayti — React 19, TailwindCSS v4 yordamida qurilgan zamonaviy bir sahifali ilova (SPA). Lucide React ikonlari, hash-link navigatsiya, responsive dizayn. Loyihalar, ko'nikmalar va tajriba bo'limlari mavjud. Vite 7 bilan tezkor build va hot reload ta'minlangan.

React 19TailwindCSS v4Vite 7SPA
07
Private

Procraft — Portfolio & Resume SaaS

Procraft — foydalanuvchilarga professional portfolio va ATS-friendly resume yaratish imkonini beruvchi to'liq stack SaaS platforma. React monorepo arxitekturasi (TurboRepo + pnpm workspace) asosida qurilgan, 4 ta alohida app (marketing landing, dashboard SPA, public profiles subdomain, admin panel) va 7 ta shared package (@procraft/ui, @procraft/hooks, @procraft/services va boshqalar) dan iborat. Frontend: React 18, Ant Design, TanStack Query, Redux Toolkit, React Router v7, react-i18next (UZ/EN/RU). Deployment: Docker Compose, Nginx reverse proxy, subdomain routing (username.procraft.uz).

React 18TurboRepoMonorepoAnt Design+5
08
Open Source

Resource — Photography Resource Website

Fotograflar uchun to'liq resurs platformasining frontend layouti. HTML5 Semantic markup va SCSS preprocessor (7-1 pattern) yordamida qurilgan. BEM metodologiyasi bilan tartibli CSS arxitekturasi. Dark mode toggle, loading animatsiya, sticky header, smooth scroll, hamburger menu — barchasi toza Vanilla JS da. Pricing kartochkalari, blog sektsiyasi, qidiruv formi va testimonial bloklari. CSS va SCSS uyg'un ishlatilgan: o'zgaruvchilar, nesting va mixin texnikalari qo'llanilgan.

HTML5SCSSBEMVanilla JS+1
09
Private

Urtak — E-Commerce & ERP Platform (Monorepo)

Urtak — o'zbek tilidagi to'liq e-commerce va ichki boshqaruv platformasi. TurboRepo + pnpm workspace asosida 3 ta alohida app: urtak.uz (xaridor sayti), dashboard.urtak.uz (admin panel), seller.urtak.uz (sotuvchi paneli). 5 ta shared package: @urtak/config (design tokens), @urtak/store (Redux), @urtak/server (Axios + 13 ta servis), @urtak/hooks (TanStack Query), @urtak/ui (umumiy komponentlar). Dashboard da 4 xil rol: superadmin, omborchi, operator, kuryer — har biri uchun alohida routing va menyu. JWT auth: Axios interceptor orqali access token avtomatik yangilanishi. Cloudflare Images CDN integratsiya — direct upload URL pattern. React Lazy + Suspense bilan kod splitting. Real API: api.urtak.uz. Nginx subdomain routing.

TurboRepoMonorepoReactRedux+6
10
Private

ilxombegimqulov.uz — Personal Brand & SEO Optimization

Ilhom Begimqulov — biznes-konsultant shaxsiy brend sayti. Statik HTML/CSS/JS arxitekturasi, 3 ta til versiyasi: lotin (index.html), kiril (kril/), rus (ru/). Cloudflare CDN orqali serve qilinadi. SEO uchun: JSON-LD structured data (Person schema) bilan alternateName pattern — Ilhom/Ilxom, kiril/lotin variantlari qidiruv natijalarida chiqishi uchun. robots.txt — test va bo'sh sahifalar bloklangan. Performance: 29 ta PNG → WebP konvertatsiya (o'rtacha 95% hajm kamaytirish), 11 ta YouTube iframe → lazy facade pattern (TBT 13,370ms → ~0ms), JS defer, Google Fonts non-blocking load. Google Search Console orqali sitemap submit va indekslash monitoring. Cloudflare Bot Management — robots.txt directive sozlash.

HTML/CSS/JSSEOJSON-LDCloudflare CDN+2
